ctxMarket: Attention is shifting from Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, which have seen significant outflows, toward alternative assets like Solana, HYPE, and XRP. Solana continues to see record activity and strong participation in tokenized assets and stablecoins.
ctxTalking:
• Institutional rotation from Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs into Solana and other altcoins
• Solana’s dominance in tokenized stock wallets and record-high activity despite recent price drops
• Security concerns after researchers flagged the TrapDoor malware campaign targeting Solana developer environments
ctxMatters: Institutional and retail interest in Solana is growing, especially in tokenized assets and stablecoins. Sustained application revenue and wallet growth suggest ongoing ecosystem engagement. However, developer security risks remain a concern for builders and projects on Solana.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Institutional flows and wallet data highlight Solana’s increasing relevance in digital asset markets.
Noise: Short-term price fluctuations without clear links to underlying activity.
ctxGlossary:
Tokenized stock wallet — A crypto wallet holding blockchain-based representations of traditional stocks
TrapDoor malware — Malicious software targeting crypto developer environments through compromised code packages

readMore.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF outflows expose rotation into HYPE, XRP and Solana
Solana captures 64% of tokenized stock wallets – What it means now
Researchers flag TrapDoor malware campaign targeting crypto developer environments including Aptos, Sui and Solana
